signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volume** in April 2026, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 20 - April 22, 2026?" (e.g., "40-64" outcome) and "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?", with the 1120-1159 range priced at **18-19%** implied probability and over **$22M+ in trading
